title: The cleaner at my office
summary: Describe the woman who cleans your office and the quiet work she does.
prompt: Write 6–8 short sentences about the cleaner who works at your office. Describe what she does, when she comes, and how you talk with her. Use present simple.
hintStarters: The cleaner at my office is a woman called…
She comes early in the morning to…
I always say good morning to her because…
sampleText: The cleaner at my office in Manila is a woman called Ate Lita. She is about forty-five years old and she has a kind face. She comes in the early shift, at five o'clock in the morning, before any of us arrive. She wears a blue uniform and white shoes. She empties every bin, wipes every table, and mops the floor in every room. By eight o'clock, the office looks like a new place. She also brings small plants to the meeting room. I always say good morning to her when I arrive at seven thirty. She smiles and asks about my children. Sometimes we share a small lunch. She eats rice with fish from a plastic box. She takes a long bus home in the afternoon. I think her job is hard, and it is often invisible. The office runs well because of her. I always say thank you when I see her.

sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: chia sẻ một bữa trưa nhỏ

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Lists with commas and 'and'
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Khi liệt kê nhiều hành động hoặc đồ vật, dùng dấu phẩy và 'and' trước cụm cuối: 'She empties every bin, wipes every table, and mops the floor'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: When listing actions or items, use commas with 'and' before the last item: 'She empties every bin, wipes every table, and mops the floor'.

sampleGrammarNotes.title: 'every' + singular noun
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: 'every' luôn đi với danh từ số ít: 'every bin', 'every table', 'every room'. Động từ chia theo chủ ngữ chính, không theo 'every'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: 'every' always goes with a singular noun: 'every bin', 'every table', 'every room'. The verb agrees with the main subject, not with 'every'.

sampleTranslationVi: Người dọn dẹp tại văn phòng tôi ở Manila là một phụ nữ tên Ate Lita. Bà khoảng bốn mươi lăm tuổi và có gương mặt hiền. Bà đến vào ca sớm, lúc năm giờ sáng, trước khi chúng tôi đến. Bà mặc đồng phục xanh và đi giày trắng. Bà đổ tất cả thùng rác, lau từng cái bàn và lau sàn ở mọi phòng. Đến tám giờ, văn phòng trông như mới. Bà cũng mang những cây nhỏ vào phòng họp. Tôi luôn chào bà khi tôi đến lúc bảy giờ ba mươi. Bà mỉm cười và hỏi thăm các con tôi. Đôi khi chúng tôi cùng ăn một bữa trưa nhỏ. Bà ăn cơm với cá trong một hộp nhựa. Bà đi xe buýt một quãng dài về nhà vào buổi chiều. Tôi nghĩ công việc của bà vất vả, và thường không ai thấy. Văn phòng vận hành tốt là nhờ bà. Tôi luôn nói cảm ơn khi gặp bà.

mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'a woman called Ate Lita'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the name in the first sentence.

mcQuestions.prompt: What time does Ate Lita arrive?
options: At four o'clock in the morning
At five o'clock in the morning
At six o'clock in the morning
At seven o'clock in the morning
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'at five o'clock in the morning'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look at the time of her shift.

options: A black uniform and brown shoes
A blue uniform and white shoes
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'She wears a blue uniform and white shoes'.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which sentence lists her tasks correctly?
options: She empties every bin wipes every table mops the floor.
She empties every bin, wipes every table, and mops the floor.
She empties every bins, wipes every tables, and mops the floors.
She empty every bin, wipe every table, mop the floor.
mcQuestions.explanation: Use commas + 'and' before the last item, and 'every' takes a singular noun.
mcQuestions.hint: Look at both the punctuation and the noun forms.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does Ate Lita also bring to the meeting room?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'She also brings small plants to the meeting room'.
mcQuestions.hint: Find the extra item she brings.

mcQuestions.prompt: What time does the writer arrive at the office?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'when I arrive at seven thirty'.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does Ate Lita eat for lunch?
options: Rice with fish from a plastic box
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'She eats rice with fish from a plastic box'.
The text says 'She takes a long bus home in the afternoon'.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does the writer think about Ate Lita's job?
options: It is hard and often invisible
It is short and well paid
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I think her job is hard, and it is often invisible'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look at the writer's opinion sentence.

criticalThinkingQuestion: Why do people often forget the workers who keep their offices clean? What would happen if we noticed them more?
